competitors.aiSummary:
# Drift Protocol Summary

Drift Protocol experienced a security incident affecting users and integrated builders. The team is coordinating recovery efforts with security firms Asymmetric Research and OpenSec, focusing on protocol stabilization and user assurance. The breach reportedly involved social engineering tactics at an in-person conference.

tweets.fullText:
Interim Update

We recognize the impact this has had across our users and the builders who have integrated with us - many of whom rely on Drift as core infrastructure.

We’re actively working on next steps and will share more once details are finalized.
tweets.aiAnalysis: This tweet underperformed because it's pure damage control with zero specificity—no acknowledgment of *what* happened, no timeline, and no concrete commitments, which creates uncertainty rather than reassurance.
